turns.text: Hi, this is an AI assistant calling on behalf of Medx, the senior-living placement service. Is this a good time to chat for two minutes?
Sure. I'm the owner of Sunset Ridge. What's this about?
Medx matches families looking for senior placement with facilities like yours. We'd love to feature Sunset Ridge in our placement queue. Would a quick callback work better?
Yeah, that sounds reasonable. Call me back Thursday at 2 PM please.
Great — Thursday at 2 PM Pacific. We'll follow up then. Thanks for your time!
